messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Extend Telegram approval replies with reject <reason> / amend <note> verbs
What it solves: BL-408 makes "approve" actually flip a pending-review ticket's
`human_approval` from a Telegram reply. This ticket is the same chain's
remaining two verbs from the original ask ("approve/amend/reject an
action ... on tickets sitting in the backlog"):
How it works: A reject reply records the rejection reason and stops re-announcing the ticket
